featured art

HAPPY POKEMON DAY !!!! this is gonna be a super short post as it's been like 40*C all day and i am too hot to think... but first of all, i drew something small to celebrate the day! it's my pokemon trainer sona, sage, holding their partner shortcake! i freaking love espurr man. its such a funny pokemon. when i eventually get around to it, i'm going to make a directory of all my plushies! that includes my espurr plushies too. Plural

happy pokemon day 2026!

27 Feb 2026

HAPPY POKEMON DAY !!!!

this is gonna be a super short post as it’s been like 40*C all day and i am too hot to think… but first of all, i drew something small to celebrate the day! it’s my pokemon trainer sona, sage, holding their partner shortcake! i freaking love espurr man. its such a funny pokemon. when i eventually get around to it, i’m going to make a directory of all my plushies! that includes my espurr plushies too. Plural

one day i’d love to own a sitting cutie variant of espurr where it’s shiny!!


talking about shiny espurr, today, my shiny espurr shortcake turns 1 year old!

i, completely by coincidence, hatched him on pokemon day last year! i’m trying to go for the ribbon master challenge on him, but i’m hard stuck on the battle maison. i’ve even tried to duo it with my girlfriend but i cant get the 50 wins to save my life…

anyway, isn’t he cute?

i would inclue a picture of all my pokemon plushies, but my dearest girlfriend is doing crossword on my bed (where two of my espurrs are) and it’s too hot and i do not wish for her to move .

have this photo of teacake, my son, as penance. even if it’s from december last year. i remember the boba tea place being like 50 degrees inside but at least we had yummy drink


also look at this

if you havent seen it already, there's a logo for every single pokemon here!



that’s all i have energy for on this sweltering day!! im excited for the pokemon presents. i wonder what they shall present. maybe in real life pikachu



byebye, until next time!!

- with love, meowpricot
